title: Switch to a Renewable Electricity Tariff
description: Switch your home electricity supply to a 100% renewable energy tariff. It takes less than 10 minutes online.

title: Install a Smart Thermostat
description: Smart thermostats optimize your heating schedule and can reduce home heating bills and emissions by up to 15%.

title: Meatless Monday Routine
description: Commit to eating entirely plant-based every Monday. Swap beef or chicken for beans, lentils, or tofu.

title: Switch to LED Lightbulbs
description: Replace remaining incandescent bulbs with energy-efficient LEDs. They use 75% less energy and last 25 times longer.

title: Eco-friendly Laundry Habits
description: Wash clothes at 30°C (86°F) and air-dry them instead of using a tumble dryer. Reduces energy consumption significantly.

title: Cycle to Work or School
description: Commit to cycling or walking your commute at least twice a week instead of driving a personal vehicle.

title: Certified Cookstove Offset Project
description: Support clean cooking stoves in developing nations. Reduces smoke and local deforestation.

title: Join a Local Repair Café
description: Fix broken household items, electronics, or clothes instead of throwing them away. Repair rather than replace.

title: Upgrade to a Low-Flow Showerhead
description: Install a water-efficient showerhead. It saves both water and the energy needed to heat it.

title: Weekly Compost Habit
description: Separate organic waste and compost it. Reduces landfill methane emissions drastically.

title: Buy Refurbished Electronics First
description: Choose certified refurbished models when buying laptops, phones, or tablets to avoid high manufacturing footprints.

title: Ditch Fast Fashion for Vinted/Depop
description: Purchase your next clothing item pre-owned on secondary marketplaces. Extends clothing lifespan.

title: Set Heating to 19°C (66°F)
description: Lower your home thermostat by just 1°C in winter. You can save up to 10% on heating energy and bills.

title: Gold Standard Reforestation Offset
description: Support native tree planting projects that store carbon and restore critical biodiversity habitats.

title: Eat Seasonally and Locally
description: Prioritize seasonal foods grown in your country. Reduces food miles and greenhouse heated farming emissions.

title: Use Public Transit for Weekend Outings
description: Take the train or bus instead of driving when heading out on weekend trips or social events.

title: Unplug Phantom Power Drawers
description: Turn off devices at the wall plug (TVs, chargers, gaming consoles) when they are not in use.

title: Install Draught Excluders
description: Block cold air drafts under doors and around window frames to retain heat inside and burn less fuel.

title: Eco-Driving Techniques
description: Drive smoothly, maintain tyre pressure, and limit idling. Can improve fuel efficiency by up to 15%.

title: Redeemable Bamboo Cutlery Travel Set
description: Redeem your Green Points for a reusable travel cutlery set. Say goodbye to single-use plastics.
